struct-type.comment: only evil weather, not the regular kind

int32_t.name: region_x
int32_t.comment: world tile, used with evil rain. Probably uninitialized with cloud

int32_t.name: region_y
int32_t.comment: world tile, used with evil rain. Probably uninitialized with cloud

int32_t.name: world_in_game_x
int32_t.comment: used with evil clouds, indicating global in-game coordinates

int32_t.name: world_in_game_y
int32_t.comment: used with evil clouds, indicating global in-game coordinates

int32_t.name: world_in_game_z
int32_t.comment: probably never used, as weather appears on the surface

int32_t.name: cloud_x_movement
int32_t.comment: -1/0/1, indicating the movement per 10 ticks in X direction. Uninitialized for rain

int32_t.name: cloud_y_movement
int32_t.comment: -1/0/1, indicating the movement per 10 ticks in Y direction. Uninitialized for rain

int32_t.name: remaining_duration
int32_t.comment: ticks down 1 every 10 ticks. Removed some time after reaching 0. Cloud duration seems to start with a fairly large, but somewhat random value
